projects.title: Ignite (اجنايت)
projects.description: Cross-platform business management solution for operations and customer connections. Architected cleanly using the MVVM pattern.

projects.title: ONE App
projects.description: All-in-One Lifestyle Solution connecting users with local businesses via shopping, food delivery, service appointments, and ticketing.

projects.title: One Biz
projects.description: Designed and developed a multi-vendor solution enabling merchants to manage sales, bookings, and products unified. Integrated Firebase, Tabby, Tamara, Nearpay, geolocations, and PDF generation.

projects.title: Doyen Audio Streaming
projects.description: A cross-platform audio streaming app similar to Clubhouse supporting live audio communication seamlessly via Agora.

projects.title: GrapevineGO
projects.description: A customized treasure hunt app where users locate hidden locations, answer questions, and compete against other teams natively.

projects.title: grapevineQUST
projects.description: A smartphone-based photo scavenger hunt app where participants engage in location-based mobile photography challenges.

projects.title: EDS Employee System
projects.description: Employee management system built with Flutter for managing staff data, attendance, payroll, and core HR operations.

projects.title: FSC Room Scanner
projects.description: A rigorous Flutter-based cleaning record management system designed for hotel staff to track workflow operations.

projects.title: Cyber Private
projects.description: An online portal app designed for cyber-security awareness allowing users to check breached credentials safely.

projects.title: PMS Tracking
projects.description: Project management system designed specifically for bug and issue tracking guaranteeing deep collaborative task efficiency.

accomplishments: Architecting complex multi-vendor solutions handling scalable global states mapping through GetX and REST.
Integrated robust payment gateways (Tabby, Tamara, Nearpay) alongside offline cache environments via Hive.
Developed cross-platform MVVM solutions for business operation and management flows.
Configured One Signal push notifications intersecting natively with Provider-based UI rendering pipelines.
Built Doyen, an interactive realtime audio streaming platform bridging the Agora SDK for ultra-low latency.
Engineered smooth cross-platform social authentication and responsive state loops safely using Provider.
Specialized in transforming deep PSD/Figma designs into highly fluid pixel-perfect mobile layouts.
Assimilated standard Dart guidelines focusing rigorously cleanly on responsive UIs and structural formatting.
